title: Rat totem
description: Have you ever wanted to have something else instead of this boring, yellow... thing?Well if yes, then this texturepack is just for you!It turns totem of undying to cute rat that sits at your shoulder when you hold it and can save your life!
body:
Have you ever wanted to have something else instead of this boring, yellow... thing?
Well if yes, then this texturepack is just for you!It turns totem of undying to cute rat that sits at your shoulder when you hold it and can save your life!
